imaging_request.indication_text: Repeat CT chest 8 weeks after prior surveillance scan showed new sub-centimeter nodule. Differential includes recurrence vs new primary vs benign granuloma. Pulmonologist requests re-imaging to assess interval change.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of upper lobe, right lung
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT1bN0M0, Stage IA. Adjuvant therapy not indicated per oncology (Stage IA). Prior surveillance CT 2026-03-30 reported a new 7mm left upper lobe nodule with indeterminate features. Requesting follow-up imaging to characterize interval change. Clinical question: surveillance for prior cancer vs diagnostic workup for new finding.
